headline: PTC's Codebeamer Gains Traction on BMW Group Digital Push
summary: PTC's Codebeamer becomes BMW's core engineering platform, unifying data and advancing AI-driven workflows as the company accelerates its intelligent lifecycle vision.

headline: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) Emerges as a Prime GARP Candidate Using Peter Lynch's Strategy
summary: PTC Inc. emerges as a strong GARP stock, fitting Peter Lynch's criteria with steady earnings growth, high profitability, and a reasonable valuation.
